auth.parentAccountHint: Your child will have their own kid-safe profile
auth.resetHint: Enter the email you used to sign up and we'll send you a reset link
auth.resetSentHint: Check your inbox and click the link in the email
auth.coppaConsent: I am the parent or legal guardian and I agree to
auth.errorPasswordWeak: Password must contain letters and numbers
auth.errorUserExists: This email is already registered. Sign in or reset your password.
auth.errorSignupDisabled: Sign-up is temporarily unavailable. Please try later.
auth.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
auth.errorNetwork: No internet connection. Check your connection.
auth.errorUnknown: Something went wrong. Please try later.
auth.deleteConfirm1Message: All data will be permanently removed. Cannot be undone.

onboarding.tutorialStart: Let me show you how to play

tapTheDot.name: Tap the dot
tapTheDot.rules:
A pink dot 🎯 will appear on the screen.

Your task — quickly tap right on it!

If you hit — great! If you miss — you'll see a thinking face and try again.

There are 5 dots per level. Fewer misses = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

countObjects.name: Count the apples
countObjects.question: How many apples?
countObjects.rules:
Apples 🍎 will appear on the screen.

Count them and enter the number using the keypad.

Tap ⌫ to erase, OK to answer.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

mathExpressions.name: Math Problems
mathExpressions.rules:
An ➕ addition or ➖ subtraction problem will appear.

Tap the correct answer from four options.

Numbers up to 10.

There are 5 problems per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

mathCompare.name: Compare
mathCompare.rules:
An empty box ⬚ appears between two numbers.

Pick the correct sign: > (greater), < (less) or = (equal).

Numbers up to 20.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

shapes.name: Shapes
shapes.rules:
A shape name will appear with 4 options.

Tap the shape whose name is written at the top.

Shapes: circle, square, triangle, rectangle.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

letters.name: Find the letter
letters.rules:
A letter will appear with 4 options.

Tap the same letter shown at the top.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

syllableBuild.name: Build a syllable
syllableBuild.rules:
A consonant is shown with an empty slot.

Pick the right vowel to build the syllable.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

oddOneOut.name: Odd one out
oddOneOut.rules:
Four items will appear on screen.

Three of them belong together (e.g. fruits), but one doesn't fit.

Tap the one that doesn't belong!

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

patternNext.name: What's next?
patternNext.rules:
A repeating color pattern will appear.

Look at the order and pick which color comes next!

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

lettersEn.name: Find the letter (EN)
lettersEn.rules:
A Latin letter will appear with 4 options.

Tap the same letter shown at the top.

ABC practice — letters A to T.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

englishWord.name: Words + pictures
englishWord.rules:
A picture and 3 English words will appear.

Tap the correct word for the picture.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

emotions.name: Emotions
emotions.rules:
A face with an emotion will appear on screen.

Pick the correct emotion name from three options.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

memoryMatch.name: Find the pair
memoryMatch.rules:
The board has 16 cards face down — 8 pairs.

Tap two cards. If the images match, the pair stays open.

If not, the cards flip back.

Find all 8 pairs to win!

animals.name: Where do they live?
animals.rules:
An animal will appear on screen 🐾.

Pick where it lives: 🌳 forest, 🏠 home, or 🌊 sea.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

whatsChanged.name: What's changed?
whatsChanged.rules:
Watch carefully — 4 items will appear. Remember them.

Then one item will change. Find and tap the one that became different!

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

sequenceRepeat.name: Repeat
sequenceRepeat.rules:
Watch carefully — the colored buttons will light up one by one.

When the sequence ends, repeat it in the same order!

There are 3 tasks per level. Exact match = ⭐⭐⭐:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

colors.name: Find the color
colors.rules:
A color name will appear on top with 4 colored circles below.

Tap the circle of the color named at the top.

Colors: red, blue, green, yellow, purple, orange.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

waterStates.name: Water
waterStates.rules:
An item related to water will appear.

Choose its state: 🧊 solid, 💧 liquid, or 💨 gas.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

plantGrow.name: How plants grow
plantGrow.rules:
A plant at a certain growth stage will appear.

Pick the correct next stage from three options.

Stages: 🌰 seed → 🌱 sprout → 🌿 leaves → 🌷 bloom → 🍎 fruit.

There are 4 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

sinkFloat.name: Sink or float?
sinkFloat.rules:
An item will appear on screen.

Pick what happens in water: ☁️ floats or ⬇️ sinks.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

heroEmotion.name: How does hero feel?
heroEmotion.rules:
A situation and a picture will appear.

Pick the emotion the hero might feel: happy, sad, angry, scared, surprised, or sleepy.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

breathing.name: Breathing
breathing.rules:
Watch the balloon 🎈.

When it grows — breathe in. When it shrinks — breathe out.

Repeat 5 times to calm down.

This is a relaxation exercise — no mistakes here!

safety.name: Safety
safety.rules:
An item from around the house will appear.

Decide: ✓ safe to play with, or ✗ not without a grown-up.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

parent.timeHint: Coming soon: daily time limit & schedule.
parent.scheduleHint: Coming soon: allowed hours for playing.
parent.activityEmpty: Stats will appear after the first game.
parent.pinSetupHint: PIN protects the parent panel from the child.
parent.pinHint: PIN is required to access the parent panel.
parent.pinForgotHint: Confirm the password for {{email}} to set a new PIN. Or send a password reset email.

profiles.deleteConfirmMsg: This child's progress will be lost.
